project.name: ExploreWorld
project.description: A clean, modern, animated travel website showcasing 10 global destinations

architecture.structure: Single index.html — no build step, no server required
architecture.html: Linear section order with semantic markup

sections.label: Hero
sections.description: Full-screen parallax background with fade-in animation, badge, headline, subtitle, and CTA button

sections.label: Stats Bar
sections.description: Animated counters: 10 destinations, 50,000+ travelers, 98% satisfaction, 7 years experience

sections.label: Destinations Grid
sections.description: 10 country cards with images, flags, descriptions, hover zoom, and click-to-modal interaction

sections.label: Featured Destinations
sections.description: Large full-height cards for France, Senegal, Spain with slide-in animation

sections.label: Travel Gallery
sections.description: 8-image masonry grid with hover zoom overlay and click-to-lightbox

sections.label: Testimonials Slider
sections.description: 4-card auto-playing carousel with dot indicators and prev/next controls

sections.label: Footer / Contact
sections.description: Newsletter subscribe form, destination quick links, company links, social icons

animations: Hero fade-in on page load (CSS keyframe)
Parallax scroll effect on hero background
Animated number counters on stats bar
Hover zoom on destination cards, featured cards, and gallery images
Slider dot active state morphing (width transition)
Button hover lift with enhanced shadow
interactions: Sticky navbar — transparent over hero, frosted-glass after scroll
Destination card click → country detail modal
Featured card click → country detail modal
Lightbox: click outside or × to close
Modal: click outside or × to close
Auto-playing testimonial slider (4.5s interval, resets on manual interaction)
Smooth scroll navigation from nav links
Keyboard: Escape closes modal and lightbox

responsive.mobile: Single-column layout, hamburger nav, simplified gallery grid

accessibility: ARIA roles on modal and lightbox (role=dialog, aria-modal)

performance.imageFormat: Unsplash CDN with width and quality parameters (e.g. ?w=600&q=80)
performance.animations: CSS transforms only (no layout-triggering properties), passive scroll listeners
